modules.name: C++ Coding Booster Intensive
modules.description: Full-day intensive workshop building practical fluency in C++ for enterprise and performance-critical environments. Focuses on data representation, memory management, and real-world Transaction Processing Systems (TPS). Problem-based learning using ServiceNow-style support tickets.

lessons.title: Core Concept Overview
topics: Variables, data types, and memory allocation
Data conversion techniques (type casting, formatting, binary)
Pointers and memory addressing
OOP: classes, objects, inheritance, encapsulation
Key terms: pointer, type casting, heap vs stack, TPS

lessons.title: Hands-On Application
topics: Build a Transaction class with private attributes and public methods
Use pointers to manipulate stored data
Type casting to simulate data conversion
Simplified TPS parser (amount, account number, assembler-style format)
AI-assisted development with ChatGPT and GitHub Copilot
Pair programming and peer review

lessons.title: Advanced Concepts & Comparisons
topics: Memory segmentation: code, data, stack, heap
Manual memory management (new/delete)
Assembler compatibility and low-level instruction mapping
Data formatting for inter-system communication (padding, alignment)
C++ vs Python and C++ OOP vs Java/C# OOP
Lab: debug broken C++ code from a simulated support ticket
TDD with assert or GoogleTest

lessons.title: Troubleshooting & Best Practices
topics: Dangling pointers and memory leaks
Type mismatches and undefined behavior
Best practices: nullptr, smart pointers (unique_ptr, shared_ptr)
Live troubleshooting: data corruption during casting in TPS processor
AI-assisted debugging and code comparison

assessment.title: Wrap-Up & Final Challenge
items: Final quiz (15–20 questions) on pointers, memory, OOP, and practical workflows
Final support ticket challenge: investigate and fix TPS data formatting logic error
Document solution and submit pull request to team GitHub repo
Optional Certificate of Completion for >80% score
